title: One time opportunity for extension of period of Reservation of Name.
description: One time opportunity for extension of period of Reservation of Name.
file_title: One time opportunity for extension of period of Reservation of Name..pdf
text: General Circular No, fLl2OL4 MCA2L I 7 2 I 2Ot4-e-9ov.Cetl Government of India Ministry of Corporate Affairs .'A,, Wing, sth Floor, Shastri Bhawan Dr. R.p Road, New Dethi_110001 To All Regional Directors, All Registrar of Companies, All Stakeholders. Date 12fr May,2Ot4 Sub: - One time opportunity for extension of period of Reservation of Name, Sir, Services for incorporation of companies were not available on the MCA21 portal to stakeholders from 1st April, 2014 to 2gth AW]L 2014 because of the deplovment requiremenb for new E-forms. Many stakeholders had reserved names for the DurDose of Company incorporation with 60 days prescribed validity expiring during the above mentioned period. They could not avail of the 60 days prescribed period for using the name to complete the corresponding incorporation requirements due to the non_ availability of services. 2. In view ofthis, the validity of reservation of all such names with due date of expiry between 1st April, 2014 to 28th April, 2074 is hereby extended upto 31sr May, 2014. All applicants whose cases fall in the above mentioned category may be advised to file relevant E-forms for incorporating companies under the Companies Act, 2013 well before the extended validity period. Yours faithfully, ,h'MM.u6 Assistant Director reF23387263 1. PPS to Secretary 2. pps to Additional Secretary 3. ees to lslny / JS(B)/JS(My Dil(ucN)/Dil(BNH) 4. ps to DIR(AB) & ps to DtR(Nc) & DtR(ps). -- 1 of 1 --
